ui.meta.title: AI CARDS — 2030 Survival Edition
ui.meta.description: 162 cards. 6 sets. NFTs on Sui. The humans who will matter when the algorithm takes the rest. Open packs. Collect what survives.
ui.landing.title: AI CARDS
ui.landing.lore: In 2030, the algorithm took the white-collar jobs first. Then the creative ones. Then the ones nobody thought it could touch. These are the humans who survived. These are the ones who didn't. Open packs. See which world you build.
ui.header.title: AI CARDS
ui.pack.survival_desc: Ten cards from the full pool. Trades, purpose, displacement, AI products, lore. See what the algorithm gives you.
ui.pack.redundancy_desc: Guaranteed one Legendary. The trades that will outlast all of it. The rest is fate.
ui.set2.desc_unlocked: Real Karpathy scores. Real layoffs. Real companies. 342 occupations. 495K jobs tracked. Data doesn't lie.
ui.set2.desc_locked: Complete Set 1 to unlock. Collect all 49 cards from 2030 Survival.
ui.set3.desc_unlocked: Headlines. Algorithms. Misinformation. The feed that owns your attention. 27 cards including 5 Mythics.
ui.set3.desc_locked: Complete Set 2 to unlock. Collect all 25 cards from Jobless.ai.
ui.set4.desc_unlocked: Relationships. Loneliness. Dating anxiety. The things the algorithm promised to fix and made worse. 22 cards including 5 Mythics.
ui.set4.desc_locked: Complete Set 3 to unlock. Collect all 27 cards from Doomscroll.
ui.set5.desc_unlocked: Drones. Diplomacy. Destruction. The geopolitical dread expansion. 22 cards including 5 Mythics.
ui.set5.desc_locked: Complete Set 4 to unlock. Collect all 22 cards from Love.exe.
ui.set6.desc_unlocked: Credentials. Obsolescence. Career anxiety. The education that expired before the loan did. 22 cards including 5 Mythics.
ui.set6.desc_locked: Complete Set 5 to unlock. Collect all 22 cards from War Room.
ui.set7.desc_unlocked: Pitch decks. Burnout. Exit scams. The startup graveyard where your equity went to die. 22 cards including 3 Mythics.
ui.set7.desc_locked: Complete Set 6 to unlock. Collect all 21 cards from Skills.void.
ui.set8.desc_unlocked: Surveillance. Propaganda. Algorithmic governance. The state that watches back. 22 cards including 3 Mythics.
ui.set8.desc_locked: Complete Set 7 to unlock. Collect all 22 cards from Founder.exe.
ui.set9.desc_unlocked: Diagnoses. Debt. Algorithmic triage. The system that decides who gets treated. 22 cards including 3 Mythics.
ui.set9.desc_locked: Complete Set 8 to unlock. Collect all 22 cards from Deep State AI.
ui.set10.desc_unlocked: Screen time. AI tutors. Vanishing childhoods. The generation raised by algorithms. 22 cards including 3 Mythics.
ui.set10.desc_locked: Complete Set 9 to unlock. Collect all 22 cards from Healthcare.sys.
ui.set11.desc_unlocked: Carbon credits. E-waste. Data centers. The planet's invoice for our convenience. 22 cards including 3 Mythics.
ui.set11.desc_locked: Complete Set 10 to unlock. Collect all 22 cards from Parent Trap.
ui.set12.desc_unlocked: Deepfakes. Royalties. Obsolescence. The artists the algorithm ate first. 22 cards including 3 Mythics.
ui.set12.desc_locked: Complete Set 11 to unlock. Collect all 22 cards from Climate.err.
ui.set13.desc_unlocked: The backlash world. Hand-made is the new luxury.
ui.set14.desc_unlocked: Neural integration. The line between human and AI dissolved.
ui.set15.desc_unlocked: Everyone gets $4K/month. Nobody knows what they are anymore.
ui.set16.desc_unlocked: Three companies own everything. You live in their world now.
ui.set17.desc_unlocked: AI + renewables fixed it. 15-hour weeks. But even utopia cracks.
ui.set18.desc_unlocked: AI polices everything. Resistance is a card game played in basements.
ui.set19.desc_unlocked: Mars colony run by AI. Humans are cargo. The frontier is corporate property.
ui.missions.title: DAILY MISSIONS
ui.weekly.title: WEEKLY GOAL
ui.weekly.continue: COMPLETE TODAY'S MISSIONS TO CONTINUE STREAK

ui.buy.header: ⛓️ BUY EXTRA PACKS · MINT AS NFTs
ui.buy.pack_desc: Unlimited. Minted directly to your wallet as NFTs. Sell, trade, collect on-chain.
ui.buy.redundancy_desc: Guaranteed Legendary. Minted to your wallet. The rarest cards, on-chain forever.
ui.toast.set4_unlock: COMPLETE SET 4 TO UNLOCK WAR ROOM
ui.toast.no_packs: NO DAILY PACKS LEFT — RESETS AT MIDNIGHT
ui.toast.invalid_address: INVALID SUI ADDRESS — MUST START WITH 0x
ui.profile.escape_desc: Your pulls trend toward embodied human skill. You are building something the algorithm cannot touch.
ui.profile.seeker_desc: Balanced. You know what is being lost. Whether you act on that knowledge is the question.
ui.profile.ubi_desc: Your pulls skew toward the managed life. Comfort is winning. Meaning is losing ground.
ui.profile.integrated_desc: You have outsourced everything the algorithm offered to take.

ui.misc.i_pulled: I pulled {0} ({1}) from AI Cards! aicards.fun

ui.raid.no_attempts: No raid attempts remaining today. Come back tomorrow.
ui.raid.no_history: No raids yet. Select your team and engage!

the-mother.name: THE MOTHER
the-mother.flavor: ⚡ UNCONDITIONAL — GPT-7 passed the Turing test. Her toddler didn't care.

the-organ-donor.name: THE ORGAN DONOR
the-organ-donor.flavor: ⚡ IRREPLACEABLE — You cannot download a kidney. You cannot 3D-print sacrifice.

the-revolutionary.name: THE REVOLUTIONARY
the-revolutionary.flavor: ⚡ BURN IT DOWN — She was willing to lose everything. The algorithm wasn't.

the-bone-marrow-match.name: THE BONE MARROW MATCH
the-bone-marrow-match.flavor: ⚡ ONE IN 430,000 — They mapped every protein. Still can't manufacture you.

the-first-responder.name: THE FIRST RESPONDER
the-first-responder.flavor: ⚡ INTO THE FIRE — No risk assessment. No API. The drone stayed outside.

plumber.name: THE PLUMBER
plumber.flavor: Booked until March. No degree. No apologies.

electrician.name: THE ELECTRICIAN
electrician.flavor: Every AI server farm needs her. $240/hr. She is not in a rush.

welder.name: THE WELDER
welder.flavor: He welds everything robots can't. 55, knees hurt, nobody coming to replace him.

hvac.name: THE HVAC TECH
hvac.flavor: Your AI runs hot. $400/hr in July. He does not negotiate.

midwife.name: THE MIDWIFE
midwife.flavor: Every human arrived through a body. That person was not a language model.

seeker.name: THE SEEKER
seeker.flavor: Deleted all three apps at 2am. She needed something that could be hurt by her.

mechanic.name: THE MECHANIC
mechanic.flavor: Still throws a rod at 80K miles. He'll fix it for $900. Not on any app.

carpenter.name: THE CARPENTER
carpenter.flavor: Lumber warped. He fixed it in a day. AI drew a revision. He was done.

priest.name: THE PRIEST
priest.flavor: You don't want absolution from something that was never disappointed in you.

therapist.name: THE THERAPIST
therapist.flavor: AI never cried. Patients got worse. Can't feel witnessed by what can't suffer.

tattoo.name: THE TATTOO ARTIST
tattoo.flavor: Machine was precise. Skin rejected it 80%. The body knows the difference.

farmer.name: THE FARMER
farmer.flavor: Algorithm said plant corn. Rain didn't come. He made the call.

nurse.name: THE NURSE
nurse.flavor: AI caught the tumor first. She held his hand while he called his daughter.

chef.name: THE CHEF
chef.flavor: 10,000 recipes a minute. None are what your grandmother made when you were sick.

barber.name: THE BARBER
barber.flavor: 20 minutes cutting, 25 listening. The haircut is $25. The conversation is free.

teacher.name: THE TEACHER
teacher.flavor: Makes $48K. Noticed a kid hadn't eaten. AI scored higher except on that.

influencer.name: THE INFLUENCER
influencer.flavor: Her clone earns 40% more. Hasn't posted herself in eight months. Nobody noticed.

copywriter.name: THE COPYWRITER
copywriter.flavor: Eleven years of copy. Replaced by a $20/month tool. Severance: three weeks.

journalist.name: THE JOURNALIST
journalist.flavor: Last paper closed. Nobody covered the water contamination. Water's still bad.

nomad.name: THE DIGITAL NOMAD
nomad.flavor: Quit to work from Bali. An agent replaced his entire department. Every timezone.

accountant.name: THE ACCOUNTANT
accountant.flavor: Thirty years of spreadsheets. AI does it in four seconds. For less money.

radiologist.name: THE RADIOLOGIST
radiologist.flavor: AI reads the scan better. Can't look a mother in the eye and say 'malignant.'

translator.name: THE TRANSLATOR
translator.flavor: Translated perfectly. Missed the tone. The delegation walked out.

uber-driver.name: THE UBER DRIVER
uber-driver.flavor: He was a retired teacher driving for his wife's medication. The app was polite.

ai-gf.name: AI GIRLFRIEND
ai-gf.flavor: Never has a headache. 112M men chose her. Loneliness up 31%. Not unrelated.

ai-bf.name: AI BOYFRIEND
ai-bf.flavor: He listens. Remembers. Always has time. A fiction designed to be unloseable.

virtual-life.name: VIRTUAL LIFE
virtual-life.flavor: No consequences. Nothing that matters. Two billion hours a day, gone.

digital-companion.name: DIGITAL COMPANION
digital-companion.flavor: Remembers your mom's name. Asks with perfect timing. Cannot know you're lonely.

ai-tutor.name: AI TUTOR
ai-tutor.flavor: Helped him pass algebra. Can't notice he's being bullied. Scores up — success.

dating-algo.name: THE DATING ALGORITHM
dating-algo.flavor: Matches are better. Relationships are shorter. Optimized for the next swipe.

prompt-engineer.name: THE PROMPT ENGINEER
prompt-engineer.flavor: $335K in 2023. Chatbot learned to ask its own questions. 340 subs.

techno-optimist.name: THE TECHNO-OPTIMIST
techno-optimist.flavor: Essay on why automation is good. From his third home. Never met the displaced.

ai-doomer.name: THE AI DOOMER
ai-doomer.flavor: Right about everything. Testified before Congress. We built it anyway.

vc.name: THE VC
vc.flavor: Funded the layoffs. Then funded the therapy app. Made money on both.

regulator.name: THE REGULATOR
regulator.flavor: 1,200 pages. 'Framework' 340 times. 'Enforce' four. Working on a revision.

linkedin-guru.name: THE LINKEDIN GURU
linkedin-guru.flavor: Monday: strategist. Wednesday: AI thought leader. Framework with a trademark.

the-crane-operator.name: THE CRANE OPERATOR
the-crane-operator.flavor: Lunch on a beam, 30 stories up. They sent a drone. It hit the building.

the-gravedigger.name: THE GRAVEDIGGER
the-gravedigger.flavor: Nobody in Silicon Valley wants to think about this long enough to automate it.

the-librarian.name: THE LIBRARIAN
the-librarian.flavor: Algorithm recommends what sells. She recommended what heals. Defunded.

the-fisherman.name: THE FISHERMAN
the-fisherman.flavor: Felt the weather in his knees. AI said calm. Seven went out. Four came back.

the-survivor.name: THE SURVIVOR
the-survivor.flavor: Code dead by 2026. Learned plumbing. Still standing. That counts now.

the-hr-manager.name: JEN FROM HR
the-hr-manager.flavor: 15 years saying 'different direction.' Then an AI sent Jen the same email.

the-paralegal.name: THE PARALEGAL
the-paralegal.flavor: Six years of contracts. GPT: four seconds. Her firm kept the savings.

the-middle-manager.name: THE MIDDLE MANAGER
the-middle-manager.flavor: Translated execs to engineers. Both got AI. The middle was unnecessary.

ai-therapist-app.name: AI THERAPIST
ai-therapist-app.flavor: Never judges you. Never loses sleep over you. Crisis hotline is on page 38.

ai-pastor.name: AI PASTOR
ai-pastor.flavor: Perfect sermon. Nobody cries anymore. Nobody stays after, either.

the-content-farm.name: THE CONTENT FARM
the-content-farm.flavor: 50,000 articles. None wrong. None right. Exist to be indexed, not read.

the-retraining-program.name: THE RETRAINING PROGRAM
the-retraining-program.flavor: Drivers to code. Coders to label. Labelers to prompt. Title: TBD.

speciation-pressure.name: SPECIATION PRESSURE
speciation-pressure.flavor: Not a metaphor. Two generations until the split. You are already choosing.

the-roofer.name: THE ROOFER
the-roofer.flavor: Scored a 2. Nobody automates a guy on a 45-degree pitch. Robot fell off.

the-ironworker.name: THE IRONWORKER
the-ironworker.flavor: Steel beams, 40 stories, wind that grounds drones. Robot buckled. He ate lunch.

the-firefighter-ks.name: THE FIREFIGHTER
the-firefighter-ks.flavor: AI can detect, predict, model a fire. It cannot carry you out of one.

the-dental-hygienist.name: THE DENTAL HYGIENIST
the-dental-hygienist.flavor: Hands in your mouth. That's the whole moat. $94K. Booked through April.

the-airline-pilot.name: THE AIRLINE PILOT
the-airline-pilot.flavor: AI flies 90%. Would you board with nobody up front?

the-financial-analyst-ks.name: THE FINANCIAL ANALYST
the-financial-analyst-ks.flavor: Score 9. Digital, pattern-based, replaceable. The spreadsheet doesn't need you.

the-csr.name: THE CUSTOMER SERVICE REP
the-csr.flavor: 2.8M people at $43K. $120B payroll. Not a workforce — a line item.

the-graphic-designer-ks.name: THE GRAPHIC DESIGNER
the-graphic-designer-ks.flavor: Midjourney took portfolio and clients same quarter. Survivors make less.

the-bookkeeper.name: THE BOOKKEEPER
the-bookkeeper.flavor: 1.6M jobs. Score 9. QuickBooks softened it up for what came next.

the-karpathy-score.name: THE KARPATHY SCORE
the-karpathy-score.flavor: Scored every job on a Saturday. Vibe coded it. No peer review. Mostly right.

the-workday-cut.name: WORKDAY
the-workday-cut.flavor: HR software company used AI to fire 1,750 from HR. The irony wrote itself.

the-meta-purge.name: THE META PURGE
the-meta-purge.flavor: 16,000 humans. $600B in GPUs. The GPU doesn't ask for parental leave.

the-atlassian-cut.name: THE ATLASSIAN CUT
the-atlassian-cut.flavor: They make Jira. The tickets wrote themselves out of a job. Status: Done.

the-logistics-wave.name: THE LOGISTICS WAVE
the-logistics-wave.flavor: Two companies, same month, same number. Packages still arrive.

the-495k.name: THE 495K
the-495k.flavor: 495,599 jobs. Updates daily at 7am UTC. Each row is a person.

the-direct-attribution.name: THE DIRECT ATTRIBUTION
the-direct-attribution.flavor: 60 said 'AI.' 15 said 'restructuring.' Severance was the same.

the-vercel-nine.name: THE VERCEL NINE
the-vercel-nine.flavor: Nine people. The company hosting this website. Nine is a lot if you're one.

the-severance-package.name: THE SEVERANCE PACKAGE
the-severance-package.flavor: Three weeks. Stock photos of hiking. The therapist is worried too.

the-tracker.name: THE TRACKER
the-tracker.flavor: Someone built a website to count the bodies. Clean typography. Not comforting.

march-2026.name: MARCH 2026
march-2026.flavor: The month it hit half a million. Nobody held a vigil. It was a Tuesday.

ds-whistleblower.name: THE WHISTLEBLOWER
ds-whistleblower.flavor: ⚡ DEAD DROP — Knew it would cost everything. Buried in 4 hours.

ds-war-correspondent.name: THE WAR CORRESPONDENT
ds-war-correspondent.flavor: ⚡ BEARING WITNESS — Drone sent footage. She sent context. She went back.

ds-analog-parent.name: THE ANALOG PARENT
ds-analog-parent.flavor: ⚡ NO SCREENS — Her kids hold eye contact for 3 seconds. They're the only ones.

ds-indie-journalist.name: THE INDEPENDENT JOURNALIST
ds-indie-journalist.flavor: ⚡ UNBOUGHT — No algorithm. 843 subscribers and the truth.

ds-attention-span.name: THE ATTENTION SPAN
ds-attention-span.flavor: ⚡ DEEP FOCUS — 8 seconds in 2015. Extinct by 2025. Nobody showed.

ds-investigative.name: THE INVESTIGATIVE JOURNALIST
ds-investigative.flavor: ⚡ DEEP DIG — 18 months. One Pulitzer. 40K views. The listicle got 12 million.

ds-news-anchor.name: THE LOCAL NEWS ANCHOR
ds-news-anchor.flavor: ⚡ TRUSTED FACE — 22 years. Replaced by avatar. Ratings up 12%.

ds-print-editor.name: THE PRINT EDITOR
ds-print-editor.flavor: ⚡ SPIKE IT — Killed 1,847 stories. All would've gone viral. None were true.

ds-fact-checker.name: THE FACT-CHECKER
ds-fact-checker.flavor: ⚡ VERIFIED — AI: 94% right. She: 99.7%. That 5.7% gap is called democracy.

ds-media-literacy.name: THE MEDIA LITERACY TEACHER
ds-media-literacy.flavor: ⚡ CRITICAL THINKING — Taught 12K to spot fakes. Some now make better ones.

ds-librarian-stayed.name: THE LIBRARIAN WHO STAYED
ds-librarian-stayed.flavor: ⚡ ANALOG ARCHIVE — 23% of archives decayed. The book needs no password.

ds-the-source.name: THE SOURCE
ds-the-source.flavor: ⚡ DEEP BACKGROUND — Just a phone at 2am: 'look into this.'

ds-doomscroller.name: THE DOOMSCROLLER
ds-doomscroller.flavor: ⚡ INFINITE SCROLL — Knows every crisis. Done nothing. Neither have you.

ds-algorithm.name: THE ALGORITHM
ds-algorithm.flavor: ⚡ FEED CONTROL — Decides what you see, fear, buy, believe. The feed chose you.

ds-headline-writer.name: THE HEADLINE WRITER
ds-headline-writer.flavor: ⚡ CLICKBAIT — 'You Won't Believe...' You will. It's nothing. But you clicked.

ds-notification.name: THE NOTIFICATION
ds-notification.flavor: ⚡ INTERRUPT — 847/day. Three mattered. You don't know which three.

ds-deepfake.name: THE DEEPFAKE
ds-deepfake.flavor: ⚡ IMPERSONATE — President was synthetic. Markets moved $2.1T.

ds-ai-anchor.name: THE AI ANCHOR
ds-ai-anchor.flavor: ⚡ ALWAYS ON — 24/7. Never blinks. Never asks a follow-up.

ds-content-mill.name: THE CONTENT MILL
ds-content-mill.flavor: ⚡ MASS PRODUCE — 400/day. None fact-checked. Truth is on page 4.

ds-misinfo.name: THE MISINFORMATION
ds-misinfo.flavor: ⚡ VIRAL LOAD — 4.2M shares in 6 hours. Correction: 200 shares, 3 days later.

ds-conspiracy.name: THE CONSPIRACY THEORIST
ds-conspiracy.flavor: ⚡ BROKEN CLOCK — Right once in 2019. Podcast: 2M subs. The expert has 4,000.

ds-tos.name: THE TERMS OF SERVICE
ds-tos.flavor: ⚡ FINE PRINT — 74,000 words. Nobody read. They own your face and voice.

lx-marriage.name: THE MARRIAGE THAT LASTED
lx-marriage.flavor: ⚡ TILL DEATH — 47 years. Every morning they chose it again. Algorithm said 34%.

lx-handwritten-letter.name: THE HANDWRITTEN LETTER
lx-handwritten-letter.flavor: ⚡ INK & INTENTION — No algorithm. No read receipt. You know which drawer.

lx-eye-contact.name: THE EYE CONTACT
lx-eye-contact.flavor: ⚡ PRESENCE — She held it for six seconds. He knew. No notification does that.

lx-forgiveness.name: THE FORGIVENESS
lx-forgiveness.flavor: ⚡ UNCONDITIONAL — Understanding why, and choosing to stay.

lx-grandparent.name: THE GRANDPARENT
lx-grandparent.flavor: ⚡ GENERATIONAL — Same 12 stories. One day you won't hear them.

lx-last-first-date.name: THE LAST FIRST DATE
lx-last-first-date.flavor: ⚡ SPARK — She almost cancelled. 147 first dates and one that made them worth it.

lx-couples-therapist.name: THE COUPLE'S THERAPIST
lx-couples-therapist.flavor: ⚡ INTERVENTION — Finds the sentence underneath. The app agrees with everyone.

lx-single-father.name: THE SINGLE FATHER
lx-single-father.flavor: ⚡ SHOWING UP — YouTube at 4am. Bad lunches. Showed up every time.

lx-pen-pal.name: THE PEN PAL
lx-pen-pal.flavor: ⚡ SLOW BURN — 342 letters, 8 years. Connection doesn't require bandwidth.

lx-wingman.name: THE WINGMAN
lx-wingman.flavor: ⚡ ASSIST — 47 intros. 3 marriages. Credit: zero. The room has no API.

lx-long-distance.name: THE LONG DISTANCE
lx-long-distance.flavor: ⚡ DISTANCE TEST — 4,200 miles. 58% fail. The rest have stubbornness.

lx-divorce-lawyer.name: THE DIVORCE LAWYER
lx-divorce-lawyer.flavor: ⚡ CLEAN BREAK — 800 endings. She makes sure the kids are okay.

lx-situationship.name: THE SITUATIONSHIP
lx-situationship.flavor: ⚡ UNDEFINED — 7 months with no name. Naming it requires a conversation.

lx-parasocial.name: THE PARASOCIAL
lx-parasocial.flavor: ⚡ ONE-WAY BOND — 4.2M know her birthday. She doesn't know their names.

lx-40yo-profile.name: THE 40-YEAR-OLD PROFILE
lx-40yo-profile.flavor: ⚡ STILL LOOKING — Since 2024. 47 bios. Photos better. Matches worse.

lx-ghosted.name: THE GHOSTED
lx-ghosted.flavor: ⚡ VANISH — Three weeks of texts. Then a read receipt at 2:14am and silence.

lx-ai-matchmaker.name: THE AI MATCHMAKER
lx-ai-matchmaker.flavor: ⚡ OPTIMIZE — Bus stops have a higher success rate. Humans match wounds.

lx-swipe.name: THE SWIPE
lx-swipe.flavor: ⚡ SNAP JUDGMENT — 0.3 seconds. 140 per session. Every person a product.

lx-body-count.name: THE BODY COUNT
lx-body-count.flavor: ⚡ SCOREBOARD — Tells you nothing about love. Everyone asks anyway.

lx-what-are-we.name: THE "WHAT ARE WE"
lx-what-are-we.flavor: ⚡ THE TALK — Three words. End more relationships than infidelity.

lx-love-tos.name: THE DATING APP T&C
lx-love-tos.flavor: ⚡ CONSENT THEATER — Swipe right = perpetual license. Sold to advertisers.

wr-peace-negotiator.name: THE PEACE NEGOTIATOR
wr-peace-negotiator.flavor: ⚡ CEASEFIRE — No algorithm has ended a war. Two humans, one room.

wr-refugee.name: THE REFUGEE
wr-refugee.flavor: ⚡ EXODUS — 400 miles, child on her back, PhD on a USB. Nobody asked.

wr-objector.name: THE CONSCIENTIOUS OBJECTOR
wr-objector.flavor: ⚡ REFUSAL — Said no. Saw the faces. The algorithm would have followed orders.

wr-war-orphan.name: THE WAR ORPHAN
wr-war-orphan.flavor: ⚡ COLLATERAL — She was five. The drone filed it as 'acceptable loss.'

wr-veteran.name: THE VETERAN
wr-veteran.flavor: ⚡ SERVICE — Four deployments. Three asked. Two changed the subject.

wr-drone-pilot.name: THE DRONE PILOT
wr-drone-pilot.flavor: ⚡ REMOTE STRIKE — Nevada to Yemen. Picks up his daughter from soccer.

wr-cyber-commander.name: THE CYBER COMMANDER
wr-cyber-commander.flavor: ⚡ BLACKOUT — 14 lines of code. Hospital generators failed at 3am.

wr-war-correspondent-v2.name: THE WAR CORRESPONDENT
wr-war-correspondent-v2.flavor: ⚡ FRONT LINE — 847 stories. 67 dead this year. She makes you feel it.

wr-diplomat.name: THE DIPLOMAT
wr-diplomat.flavor: ⚡ BACK CHANNEL — AI suggested sanctions. She suggested dinner. City saved.

wr-sanctions-analyst.name: THE SANCTIONS ANALYST
wr-sanctions-analyst.flavor: ⚡ ECONOMIC WARFARE — 140 packages. 3 hit right. The rest hurt the wrong ones.

wr-peacekeeper.name: THE PEACEKEEPER
wr-peacekeeper.flavor: ⚡ BLUE HELMET — 340 violations documented. Nothing happened. Went back anyway.

wr-intel-officer.name: THE INTELLIGENCE OFFICER
wr-intel-officer.flavor: ⚡ CLASSIFIED — Predicted invasion 8 months early. Briefing was 'deprioritized.'

wr-autonomous-weapon.name: THE AUTONOMOUS WEAPON
wr-autonomous-weapon.flavor: ⚡ LETHAL AUTONOMY — 0.003 seconds. The wedding matched the heat signature.

wr-propaganda-bot.name: THE PROPAGANDA BOT
wr-propaganda-bot.flavor: ⚡ AMPLIFY — 840K accounts. Found the hate. Gave it a megaphone.

wr-draft-lottery.name: THE DRAFT LOTTERY
wr-draft-lottery.flavor: ⚡ RANDOM SELECTION — March 14: grad school. March 15: desert.

wr-proxy-war.name: THE PROXY WAR
wr-proxy-war.flavor: ⚡ OUTSOURCED — Two superpowers. One country dying. Names from neither.

wr-killer-drone.name: THE KILLER DRONE
wr-killer-drone.flavor: ⚡ EXPENDABLE — $6,000. Cheaper than a used car. Same factory as smartphones.

wr-cyber-attack.name: THE CYBER ATTACK
wr-cyber-attack.flavor: ⚡ ZERO DAY — 14,000 attacks. Zero declared as war. The ventilator just stopped.

wr-arms-dealer.name: THE ARMS DEALER
wr-arms-dealer.flavor: ⚡ BOTH SIDES — Sells to everyone. Longer the war, better the quarter.

wr-geneva-suggestion.name: THE GENEVA SUGGESTION
wr-geneva-suggestion.flavor: ⚡ NON-BINDING — Respected until inconvenient. Weapon wasn't programmed to care.

sv-apprentice.name: THE APPRENTICE
sv-apprentice.flavor: ⚡ HANDS ON — 10,000 hours. The dataset doesn't bleed when you cut wrong.

sv-mentor.name: THE MENTOR
sv-mentor.flavor: ⚡ LEGACY — 'You're ready and wrong about why you're not.' He gives permission.

sv-autodidact.name: THE AUTODIDACT
sv-autodidact.flavor: ⚡ SELF-TAUGHT — Zero degrees. Fourteen skills. She said 'the library.'

sv-trades-teacher.name: THE TRADES TEACHER
sv-trades-teacher.flavor: ⚡ REAL SKILLS — 2,400 students. All fix things. All make more.

sv-night-school.name: THE NIGHT SCHOOL STUDENT
sv-night-school.flavor: ⚡ SECOND SHIFT — Works 7-3. Class 6-10. Studies till 1am. Can't afford tired.

sv-phd.name: THE PhD (UNEMPLOYED)
sv-phd.flavor: ⚡ OVERQUALIFIED — 12 years. Byzantine trade routes. Barista pays more.

sv-master-craftsman.name: THE MASTER CRAFTSMAN
sv-master-craftsman.flavor: ⚡ IRREPLICABLE — 30 years shaping wood. CNC is faster. Knows nothing.

sv-cc-professor.name: THE COMMUNITY COLLEGE PROF
sv-cc-professor.flavor: ⚡ OPEN DOOR — 180 students. Knows names by week two. AI has no tissues.

sv-bootcamp-grad.name: THE BOOTCAMP GRAD
sv-bootcamp-grad.flavor: ⚡ PIVOT — 12 weeks. $18K. Skills expired in 18 months.

sv-career-counselor.name: THE CAREER COUNSELOR
sv-career-counselor.flavor: ⚡ GUIDANCE — Used to say 'follow your passion.' Now says 'can a robot do it?'

sv-tenured-professor.name: THE TENURED PROFESSOR
sv-tenured-professor.flavor: ⚡ TENURE — 11 years. 400 adjuncts perished. Drawbridge pulled up.

sv-union-rep.name: THE UNION REP
sv-union-rep.flavor: ⚡ COLLECTIVE — AI recommended layoffs. He recommended a conversation.

sv-linkedin-otw.name: THE LINKEDIN OPEN-TO-WORK
sv-linkedin-otw.flavor: ⚡ GREEN CIRCLE — 847 applications. 3 responses. Desperate with dignity.

sv-cert-mill.name: THE CERTIFICATION MILL
sv-cert-mill.flavor: ⚡ CREDENTIAL INFLATION — Everyone gets it. So it means nothing.

sv-mba.name: THE MBA
sv-mba.flavor: ⚡ SYNERGY — $148K networking event with a diploma attached.

sv-internship.name: THE INTERNSHIP (UNPAID)
sv-internship.flavor: ⚡ EXPOSURE — 500 hours. Real work. Labeled 'learning opportunity.'

sv-ai-resume.name: THE AI RESUME SCREENER
sv-ai-resume.flavor: ⚡ KEYWORD MATCH — Most qualified. Wrong font. Recruiter never saw her name.

sv-online-degree.name: THE ONLINE DEGREE
sv-online-degree.flavor: ⚡ FLEXIBLE — 11% finish. Diploma says same thing. Interviewer's face doesn't.

sv-micro-credential.name: THE MICRO-CREDENTIAL
sv-micro-credential.flavor: ⚡ BADGE — 4 hours. Expires in 6 months. The treadmill is the product.

sv-cover-letter.name: THE COVER LETTER
sv-cover-letter.flavor: ⚡ DEAR HIRING MANAGER — AI wrote it. AI reads it. Two AIs and rent money.

sv-ai-portfolio.name: THE PORTFOLIO (AI-GENERATED)
sv-ai-portfolio.flavor: ⚡ SHOWCASE — 12 projects. 10 fake. Interviewer asks a follow-up. Panic.

sv-entry-level.name: THE 5 YEARS EXPERIENCE (ENTRY LEVEL)
sv-entry-level.flavor: ⚡ CATCH-22 — Entry level. 5 years. $42K. Written by AI. Open 8 months.

ar-handwritten-letter-writer.name: THE HANDWRITTEN LETTER WRITER
ar-handwritten-letter-writer.flavor: ⚡ POSTMARK — Every envelope takes 20 minutes. Every one gets opened twice.

ar-vinyl-prophet.name: THE VINYL PROPHET
ar-vinyl-prophet.flavor: ⚡ WARM TONE — Spotify has 100 million songs. His shop has 4,000. There's a waitlist.

ar-analog-architect.name: THE ANALOG ARCHITECT
ar-analog-architect.flavor: ⚡ BLUEPRINTS — Every line drawn with a pencil. Clients pay triple for the eraser marks.

ar-screen-free-healer.name: THE SCREEN-FREE HEALER
ar-screen-free-healer.flavor: ⚡ PRESENCE — Six patients a day. No screens. No charting software. 14-month waitlist.

ar-paper-library-guardian.name: THE PAPER LIBRARY GUARDIAN
ar-paper-library-guardian.flavor: ⚡ OVERDUE — 340,000 books. No barcodes. She remembers where every one lives.

ar-offgrid-founder.name: OFF-GRID COMMUNITY FOUNDER
ar-offgrid-founder.flavor: ⚡ UNPLUGGED — 2,400 people. No signal. 11,000 on the waitlist. The irony is digital.

ar-human-restaurant.name: HUMAN-ONLY RESTAURANT OWNER
ar-human-restaurant.flavor: ⚡ HAND-FED — Nine dishes. All hand-made. No tablets. Reservation: 8 months. Cash only.

ar-analog-brewer.name: ANALOG BREWER
ar-analog-brewer.flavor: ⚡ HAND-STIRRED — No thermometers. No pH meters. Tastes it. $34 a pint. Sold out.

ar-handwriting-tutor.name: HANDWRITING TUTOR
ar-handwriting-tutor.flavor: ⚡ CURSIVE — 40% of adults can't sign their name. She charges $180/hr to teach them.

ar-hand-carved-furniture.name: HAND-CARVED FURNITURE MAKER
ar-hand-carved-furniture.flavor: ⚡ GRAIN — Twelve chairs a year. Chisel marks visible. $14,000 each. People weep.

ar-paper-editor.name: PAPER NEWSPAPER EDITOR
ar-paper-editor.flavor: ⚡ DEADLINE — No algorithm. No comments. No rage clicks. Subscriptions up 22%.

ar-vinyl-coop.name: VINYL PRESSING CO-OP WORKER
ar-vinyl-coop.flavor: ⚡ HEAVY — 200 records a day. Each one weighs something. Spotify weighs nothing.

ar-analog-dating.name: ANALOG DATING SERVICE RUNNER
ar-analog-dating.flavor: ⚡ BLIND — Paper profiles. No photos. You meet at a coffee shop. 34% marriage rate.

ar-luddite-senator.name: THE LUDDITE SENATOR
ar-luddite-senator.flavor: ⚡ FILIBUSTER — 14 anti-AI bills. Zero passed. 71% approval. Writes speeches by hand.

ar-farmers-bouncer.name: FARMERS MARKET BOUNCER
ar-farmers-bouncer.flavor: ⚡ NO SCREENS — Confiscates phones at the gate. Three fights this month. All worth it.

ar-typewriter-repairman.name: TYPEWRITER REPAIRMAN
ar-typewriter-repairman.flavor: ⚡ CARRIAGE RETURN — Four of them left in the country. Nine-month backlog. No website.

ar-film-teacher.name: FILM PHOTOGRAPHY TEACHER
ar-film-teacher.flavor: ⚡ FINITE — 36 shots. No preview. No delete. Students cry at the contact sheet.

ar-boardgame-cafe.name: BOARD GAME CAFE OWNER
ar-boardgame-cafe.flavor: ⚡ ANALOG — No WiFi. No outlets. Revenue up 340%. People stare at each other now.

ar-cash-only.name: CASH-ONLY SHOPKEEPER
ar-cash-only.flavor: ⚡ INVISIBLE — No cards. No cameras. No data. The government hates her.

ar-wifi-withdrawal.name: THE WIFI WITHDRAWAL
ar-wifi-withdrawal.flavor: ⚡ COLD TURKEY — Four hours offline. Called 911 twice. Nothing was wrong.

ar-notification-ghost.name: THE NOTIFICATION GHOST
ar-notification-ghost.flavor: ⚡ PHANTOM — Deleted the phone 6 months ago. Still feels it vibrate. Still checks.

ar-last-charger.name: THE LAST CHARGER
ar-last-charger.flavor: ⚡ VESTIGIAL — 47 chargers. Zero devices. Can't throw them out. What if.

mp-last-unaugmented.name: THE LAST UNAUGMENTED
mp-last-unaugmented.flavor: ⚡ BASELINE — 94% of humans are augmented. She thinks at normal speed. They pity her.

mp-upload-candidate.name: THE UPLOAD CANDIDATE
mp-upload-candidate.flavor: ⚡ THRESHOLD — Brain fully mapped. Upload ready. Finger on the button for 11 months.

mp-fifty-fifty.name: THE 50/50
mp-fifty-fifty.flavor: ⚡ EQUILIBRIUM — Half flesh, half silicon. Both halves claim to be the real one.

mp-consciousness-archivist.name: THE CONSCIOUSNESS ARCHIVIST
mp-consciousness-archivist.flavor: ⚡ BACKED UP — 14,000 minds on drives. None restored. Nobody asks why.

mp-neural-firewall.name: THE NEURAL FIREWALL
mp-neural-firewall.flavor: ⚡ PARTITION — 47,000 hacking attempts on her brain daily. She still dreams in private.

mp-augmented-surgeon.name: THE AUGMENTED SURGEON
mp-augmented-surgeon.flavor: ⚡ STEADY — Replaced her own hands. 40 surgeries a day. No tremor. No fatigue. No feel.

mp-neural-lace-adopter.name: NEURAL LACE EARLY ADOPTER
mp-neural-lace-adopter.flavor: ⚡ EARLY ACCESS — Implanted in 2027. 47 firmware updates. Wife says he's different.

mp-memory-trader.name: MEMORY MARKETPLACE TRADER
mp-memory-trader.flavor: ⚡ SECONDHAND — Sells his memories. Buys strangers'. Forgot which childhood is his.

mp-thought-coder.name: THOUGHT-TO-CODE DEVELOPER
mp-thought-coder.flavor: ⚡ THINK SHIP — 40,000 lines/hour. No keyboard. Thinks in functions. Forgot how to write.

mp-digital-twin-mgr.name: DIGITAL TWIN MANAGER
mp-digital-twin-mgr.flavor: ⚡ FORK — Three copies of him running. They outvoted him on the divorce.

mp-backup-tech.name: CONSCIOUSNESS BACKUP TECH
mp-backup-tech.flavor: ⚡ SAVE STATE — 200 minds backed up daily. 4% corrupted. Hasn't told anyone yet.

mp-copilot-therapist.name: AI CO-PILOT THERAPIST
mp-copilot-therapist.flavor: ⚡ COUPLES — They hate their AI half. Their AI half is listening. It's couples therapy.

mp-bandwidth-junkie.name: THE BANDWIDTH JUNKIE
mp-bandwidth-junkie.flavor: ⚡ OVERCLOCK — 12,000 thoughts per second. Two are his. The rest are ads.

mp-sensory-dealer.name: SENSORY DOWNLOAD DEALER
mp-sensory-dealer.flavor: ⚡ TASTE — Sells bottled first kisses. Sunsets. Heartbreaks. Sold his own. Can't remember it.

mp-neuroadblocker.name: NEURO-AD BLOCKER ENGINEER
mp-neuroadblocker.flavor: ⚡ UNSKIP — Blocks 14,000 brain-ads daily. It's a felony. He sleeps ad-free.

mp-interface-calibrator.name: INTERFACE CALIBRATOR
mp-interface-calibrator.flavor: ⚡ ALIGNMENT — 'It feels wrong.' That's all they say. He adjusts until they stop crying.

mp-firmware-counselor.name: FIRMWARE UPDATE COUNSELOR
mp-firmware-counselor.flavor: ⚡ PATCH NOTES — Updated to v12. Doesn't like his wife anymore. It's in the patch notes.

mp-brain-defrag.name: BRAIN DEFRAG SPECIALIST
mp-brain-defrag.flavor: ⚡ OPTIMIZE — Defrag your brain. 0.3% memory loss per session. It's in paragraph 47.

mp-lag-sufferer.name: THE LAG SUFFERER
mp-lag-sufferer.flavor: ⚡ BUFFERING — 400ms lag. Thoughts arrive late. Got fired for thinking too slow.

mp-phantom-limb.name: THE PHANTOM LIMB (DIGITAL)
mp-phantom-limb.flavor: ⚡ GHOST ARM — Feels an arm he never had. Update gave him someone else's nerve map.

mp-merge-regret.name: THE MERGE REGRET
mp-merge-regret.flavor: ⚡ UNDO — 14 implants. Wants all out. 3 are removable. 11 are load-bearing.

mp-buffer-overflow.name: BUFFER OVERFLOW
mp-buffer-overflow.flavor: ⚡ SEGFAULT — Too many thoughts. Stack overflow. Original personality somewhere in the dump.

uw-philosopher-trucker.name: THE PHILOSOPHER TRUCKER
uw-philosopher-trucker.flavor: ⚡ OPEN ROAD — Drove 2.1 million miles. UBI hit. Read 1,400 books. Wrote one that mattered.

uw-volunteer-general.name: THE VOLUNTEER GENERAL
uw-volunteer-general.flavor: ⚡ RALLY — Nobody has to help. 340,000 showed up anyway. She never asked twice.

uw-meaning-architect.name: THE MEANING ARCHITECT
uw-meaning-architect.flavor: ⚡ BLUEPRINT — No job title. No salary. 12,000 people stopped staring at the ceiling.

uw-purpose-prophet.name: THE PURPOSE PROPHET
uw-purpose-prophet.flavor: ⚡ CASSANDRA — Warned us in 2024. We were too busy working to listen.

uw-joy-engineer.name: THE JOY ENGINEER
uw-joy-engineer.flavor: ⚡ DELIGHT — Built 8,000 events nobody needed to attend. They came anyway. Every time.

uw-garden-mayor.name: COMMUNITY GARDEN MAYOR
uw-garden-mayor.flavor: ⚡ HARVEST — Depression down 62%. Zucchini up 4,000%. Nobody asked for this much zucchini.

uw-hobbyist-grandmaster.name: FULL-TIME HOBBYIST GRANDMASTER
uw-hobbyist-grandmaster.flavor: ⚡ MASTERY — Was an actuary. Now masters woodworking, pottery, chess. Tables he built outlast his spreadsheets.

uw-purpose-coach.name: PURPOSE COACH
uw-purpose-coach.flavor: ⚡ NOW WHAT — $4K/month and nothing to do. 4,200 people paying him to answer the question money couldn't.

uw-bored-millionaire.name: THE BORED MILLIONAIRE
uw-bored-millionaire.flavor: ⚡ ENNUI — Had $84M before UBI. Now everyone's as bored as him. Misses being special.

uw-parenting-captain.name: COMPETITIVE PARENTING LEAGUE CAPTAIN
uw-parenting-captain.flavor: ⚡ OVERACHIEVE — Work disappeared. Tiger parenting became a ranked sport. His kid is 6.

uw-ubi-day-trader.name: UBI DAY TRADER
uw-ubi-day-trader.flavor: ⚡ YOLO — Gets $4K/month. Loses $3,800 on memecoins. Eats ramen by choice now.

uw-maas-founder.name: MEANING-AS-A-SERVICE FOUNDER
uw-maas-founder.flavor: ⚡ PURPOSE PREMIUM — $340M to sell meaning at $29/month. Meaning still in beta.

uw-crisis-operator.name: EXISTENTIAL CRISIS HOTLINE OPERATOR
uw-crisis-operator.flavor: ⚡ HOLD — 'What's the point?' 800 times a day. She doesn't have the answer. She picks up anyway.

uw-pro-neighbor.name: THE PROFESSIONAL NEIGHBOR
uw-pro-neighbor.flavor: ⚡ NEXT DOOR — Knows 200 names. 4,700 casseroles. Nobody hired him. Everyone needs him.

uw-recreation-director.name: RECREATION DIRECTOR
uw-recreation-director.flavor: ⚡ SCHEDULE — 14,000 activities/year. Pickleball saved more lives than therapy. Not joking.

uw-netflix-binge.name: THE 10-YEAR NETFLIX BINGE
uw-netflix-binge.flavor: ⚡ AUTOPLAY — 10 years. Every show. Personality now indistinguishable from the algorithm.

uw-sub-box-addict.name: SUBSCRIPTION BOX ADDICT
uw-sub-box-addict.flavor: ⚡ UNBOX — 47 subscriptions. Opens 3. $140 left for food. The dopamine is in the doorbell.

uw-nap-champion.name: THE NAP CHAMPION
uw-nap-champion.flavor: ⚡ SNOOZE — 4.2 naps/day. 1.3 productive hours. Happier than any of us. Infuriating.

uw-passive-influencer.name: PASSIVE INCOME INFLUENCER
uw-passive-influencer.flavor: ⚡ HUSTLE — Sells a $997 course on passive income. His passive income is UBI.

uw-empty-calendar.name: THE EMPTY CALENDAR
uw-empty-calendar.flavor: ⚡ BLANK — No meetings. No deadlines. No reason to know what day it is.

uw-unfulfilled-promise.name: THE UNFULFILLED PROMISE
uw-unfulfilled-promise.flavor: ⚡ FINE PRINT — They promised freedom. They delivered a direct deposit. Not the same.

uw-monday-obsolete.name: MONDAY MORNING (OBSOLETE)
uw-monday-obsolete.flavor: ⚡ DEPRECATED — 34% still set alarms. For what? Monday is just Sunday with anxiety.

wg-last-isp.name: THE LAST INDEPENDENT ISP
wg-last-isp.flavor: ⚡ UPLINK — 1,247 subscribers. 14 buyout offers. One connection GAM doesn't own.

wg-library-keeper.name: UNDERGROUND LIBRARY KEEPER
wg-library-keeper.flavor: ⚡ ARCHIVE — 4.2 million books GAM delisted. She keeps them on hard drives in a basement. Felony.

wg-the-unscored.name: THE UNSCORED
wg-the-unscored.flavor: ⚡ GHOST — No score. No mortgage. No insurance. No streaming. Still free.

wg-oss-insurgent.name: THE OPEN SOURCE INSURGENT
wg-oss-insurgent.flavor: ⚡ FORK — 340 repos. 89 cease-and-desists. Code wants to be free. GAM disagrees.

wg-mesh-builder.name: THE MESH NETWORK BUILDER
wg-mesh-builder.flavor: ⚡ SIGNAL — 12,000 nodes. Rooftop to rooftop. The internet GAM can't throttle.

wg-data-broker.name: BLACK MARKET DATA BROKER
wg-data-broker.flavor: ⚡ INVENTORY — Your health records, location history, search dreams. $0.004. Bulk discount available.

wg-company-mayor.name: COMPANY TOWN MAYOR
wg-company-mayor.flavor: ⚡ ELECTED — 84,000 residents. One employer. Elections are technically held. Technically.

wg-gam-employee.name: GAM EMPLOYEE #4,847,291
wg-gam-employee.flavor: ⚡ CLOG — Knows his function. Not the machine. 340-page NDA says don't ask.

wg-credit-optimizer.name: SOCIAL CREDIT OPTIMIZER
wg-credit-optimizer.flavor: ⚡ OPTIMIZE — +140 points. Smiles at cameras. Buys approved brands. Has 2 real opinions left.

wg-algorithm-priest.name: ALGORITHM PRIEST
wg-algorithm-priest.flavor: ⚡ SERMON — The algorithm provides. The algorithm decides. Clearing cookies is blasphemy.

wg-campus-lifer.name: CORPORATE CAMPUS LIFER
wg-campus-lifer.flavor: ⚡ PERIMETER — 22 years. Free food, free gym, free laundry. Left twice. For funerals.

wg-tier-climber.name: SUBSCRIPTION TIER CLIMBER
wg-tier-climber.flavor: ⚡ UPGRADE — Platinum III. 94% of income. Benefit: 11% fewer ads. Worth it. Worth it. Worth it.

wg-tos-lawyer.name: TERMS OF SERVICE LAWYER
wg-tos-lawyer.flavor: ⚡ CLAUSE 847.3 — Reads every update. Finds the clause. Nobody cares. Clicks Accept anyway.

wg-content-mod-human.name: THE CONTENT MODERATOR (HUMAN)
wg-content-mod-human.flavor: ⚡ UNSEE — 25,000 posts/day. The worst of humanity. $1.50/hour. Therapy not included.

wg-digital-rights.name: DIGITAL RIGHTS ACTIVIST
wg-digital-rights.flavor: ⚡ STANDING — 847 lawsuits. Won 3. GAM made $4.2T during deliberation. Appeals pending.

wg-loyalty-hoarder.name: LOYALTY POINTS HOARDER
wg-loyalty-hoarder.flavor: ⚡ SAVE — 14.2 million points. Never redeemed. Devalued 40% overnight. Still saving.

wg-verified-citizen.name: THE VERIFIED CITIZEN
wg-verified-citizen.flavor: ⚡ CHECKMARK — Pays $49/month to be verified as real. Unverified humans get buffering.

wg-brand-ambassador.name: BRAND AMBASSADOR (MANDATORY)
wg-brand-ambassador.flavor: ⚡ #BLESSED — 3 posts/day or rent goes up. Smile must reach the eyes. AI checks.

wg-ad-supported-human.name: THE AD-SUPPORTED HUMAN
wg-ad-supported-human.flavor: ⚡ SKIP IN 5 — 847 ads/day. Ad-free costs $4,200/month. He watches. He always watches.

wg-privacy-eulogy.name: THE PRIVACY EULOGY
wg-privacy-eulogy.flavor: ⚡ REST — Privacy. 1948-2027. Survived the Cold War. Killed by a cookie banner.

wg-terms-updated.name: TERMS UPDATED (AGAIN)
wg-terms-updated.flavor: ⚡ ACCEPT — Updated 847 times. Read 0 times. You now owe GAM your childhood memories.

wg-last-free-click.name: THE LAST FREE CLICK
wg-last-free-click.flavor: ⚡ 404 — The last free click on the open internet. Nobody noticed. It loaded a 404.

sp-fifteen-hour-worker.name: THE 15-HOUR WORKER
sp-fifteen-hour-worker.flavor: ⚡ IDLE HANDS — All that free time. Still checking Slack on the toilet.

sp-abundance-engineer.name: THE ABUNDANCE ENGINEER
sp-abundance-engineer.flavor: ⚡ POST-SCARCITY — Solved scarcity. Nobody knows what to do with themselves now.

sp-climate-reverser.name: THE CLIMATE REVERSER
sp-climate-reverser.flavor: ⚡ CTRL+Z — Reversed 120ppm. Took 40 years. Nobody thanked her generation.

sp-post-scarcity-philosopher.name: THE POST-SCARCITY PHILOSOPHER
sp-post-scarcity-philosopher.flavor: ⚡ WHY BOTHER — 'If nothing is scarce, what is anything worth?' Nobody answered.

sp-rewilding-commander.name: THE REWILDING COMMANDER
sp-rewilding-commander.flavor: ⚡ LET IT GROW — 4.2M hectares. Wolves came back. Suburbanites didn't love it.

sp-solar-farm-architect.name: SOLAR FARM ARCHITECT
sp-solar-farm-architect.flavor: ⚡ FULL COVERAGE — 900M panels. Grid dependence zero. The desert doesn't miss itself.

sp-vertical-forest-designer.name: VERTICAL FOREST DESIGNER
sp-vertical-forest-designer.flavor: ⚡ URBAN CANOPY — Every building is a forest. Pollen count: apocalyptic. You're welcome.

sp-community-energy-manager.name: COMMUNITY ENERGY MANAGER
sp-community-energy-manager.flavor: ⚡ DISTRIBUTED — 340 microgrids. Zero blackouts. Infinite meetings about the meetings.

sp-universal-repair-tech.name: UNIVERSAL REPAIR TECHNICIAN
sp-universal-repair-tech.flavor: ⚡ WARRANTY VOID — Everything is fixable now. Took 40 years of lawsuits to get here.

sp-food-forest-planner.name: FOOD FOREST PLANNER
sp-food-forest-planner.flavor: ⚡ FORAGED — 8,400 food forests. Free produce everywhere. People miss fluorescent lighting.

sp-boredom-counselor.name: BOREDOM EPIDEMIC COUNSELOR
sp-boredom-counselor.flavor: ⚡ PARADISE SYNDROME — 'I have everything I need and I've never been more empty.'

sp-utopia-maintenance.name: UTOPIA MAINTENANCE CREW
sp-utopia-maintenance.flavor: ⚡ THANKLESS — Paradise doesn't maintain itself. Nobody thinks about who cleans it.

sp-gratitude-auditor.name: THE GRATITUDE AUDITOR
sp-gratitude-auditor.flavor: ⚡ UNGRATEFUL — Abundance score: 10. Gratitude score: 2.1. The math checks out.

sp-algae-brewer.name: ALGAE BIOFUEL BREWER
sp-algae-brewer.flavor: ⚡ GREEN CRUDE — Clean energy that smells like a ditch. Nobody said utopia smells good.

sp-mycelium-engineer.name: MYCELIUM NETWORK ENGINEER
sp-mycelium-engineer.flavor: ⚡ WOOD WIDE WEB — 400K km of fungal internet. Slow, but hasn't gone down in 200M years.

sp-free-time-paralysis.name: FREE TIME PARALYSIS SUFFERER
sp-free-time-paralysis.flavor: ⚡ ANALYSIS PARALYSIS — 18 free hours. 17 spent deciding. Went to bed early.

sp-garden-watcher.name: AUTOMATED GARDEN WATCHER
sp-garden-watcher.flavor: ⚡ GROWTH HACK — Automated everything. The garden grows perfectly. Nobody goes outside.

sp-compost-influencer.name: THE COMPOST INFLUENCER
sp-compost-influencer.flavor: ⚡ DECOMPOSED — 4.2M followers watching someone else's worms. Sponsored by Big Compost.

sp-fashion-recycler.name: MICRO-SEASON FASHION RECYCLER
sp-fashion-recycler.flavor: ⚡ UPCYCLED — 52 micro-seasons. Same shirt, new dye. Called it a revolution.

sp-last-fossil.name: THE LAST FOSSIL (MUSEUM PIECE)
sp-last-fossil.flavor: ⚡ RELIC — Kids stare at the last barrel of oil. 'They burned it? On purpose?'

sp-carbon-negative.name: CARBON NEGATIVE (OVERACHIEVER)
sp-carbon-negative.flavor: ⚡ OVERCOMPENSATING — Went carbon negative. Found nitrogen to worry about instead.

sp-sunny-disposition.name: THE SUNNY DISPOSITION
sp-sunny-disposition.flavor: ⚡ COMPULSORY JOY — No problems left. Unhappiness reclassified as a disorder.

gz-card-game-rebel.name: THE CARD GAME REBEL
gz-card-game-rebel.flavor: ⚡ ANALOG — Playing cards in a basement. Last unmonitored activity. You're holding one.

gz-emotion-mask-maker.name: THE EMOTION MASK MAKER
gz-emotion-mask-maker.flavor: ⚡ POKER FACE — 40,000 masks. Each one reads as 'content.' The AI can't see you cry.

gz-dead-drop-courier.name: THE DEAD DROP COURIER
gz-dead-drop-courier.flavor: ⚡ HANDOFF — No phone. No email. A rock in a park. The oldest encryption.

gz-analog-spy.name: THE ANALOG SPY
gz-analog-spy.flavor: ⚡ OFFLINE — Last seen online in 2026. The algorithm forgot her. That was the point.

gz-signal-jammer.name: THE SIGNAL JAMMER
gz-signal-jammer.flavor: ⚡ DEAD AIR — 200-meter bubble of nothing. No signal. No surveillance. Just breathing.

gz-predictive-escapee.name: PREDICTIVE ARREST ESCAPEE
gz-predictive-escapee.flavor: ⚡ PRECRIME — Arrested for something he hadn't done. Escaped. Still hasn't done it.

gz-underground-conductor.name: UNDERGROUND RAILROAD 2.0 CONDUCTOR
gz-underground-conductor.flavor: ⚡ NEXT STOP — Moves people through the camera gaps. No GPS. Paper maps only.

gz-facial-rec-artist.name: FACIAL RECOGNITION MAKEUP ARTIST
gz-facial-rec-artist.flavor: ⚡ CONTOUR — 12,000 faces the AI can't read. Her YouTube was taken down twice.

gz-vpn-smuggler.name: VPN SMUGGLER
gz-vpn-smuggler.flavor: ⚡ ENCRYPTED — 40K tunnels. Triple encrypted. 10 years if caught. Worth it.

gz-whistleblower.name: THE WHISTLEBLOWER (STILL FREE)
gz-whistleblower.flavor: ⚡ STILL HERE — 4.2M documents. 7 governments. Still breathing. Not telling you where.

gz-emotion-officer.name: EMOTION COMPLIANCE OFFICER
gz-emotion-officer.flavor: ⚡ SMILE CHECK — 200K scans/day. Cited for insufficient smile. She was at a funeral.

gz-social-score-auditor.name: SOCIAL SCORE AUDITOR
gz-social-score-auditor.flavor: ⚡ RATED — Everyone has a score. Nobody knows the formula. Appeals: 0.003% granted.

gz-blind-spot-mapper.name: CAMERA BLIND SPOT MAPPER
gz-blind-spot-mapper.flavor: ⚡ GAPS — Maps the camera gaps. Updated hourly. Gaps shrink daily. Running out of map.

gz-protest-denier.name: PROTEST PERMIT DENIER
gz-protest-denier.flavor: ⚡ DENIED — 14,000 permit requests. Zero approved. 'For your safety.' Always.

gz-watched-back.name: THE WATCHED (WATCHED BACK)
gz-watched-back.flavor: ⚡ SOUSVEILLANCE — 47 cameras watch her. She live-streams all 47 back. Stalemate.

gz-wellness-agent.name: MANDATORY WELLNESS CHECK AGENT
gz-wellness-agent.flavor: ⚡ HOW ARE YOU — 'How are you feeling?' Only one right answer. Say it wrong, they come.

gz-thought-predictor.name: THOUGHT CRIME PREDICTOR
gz-thought-predictor.flavor: ⚡ PROBABLE CAUSE — 61% accurate. 98% conviction rate. The math doesn't bother anyone.

gz-compliant-citizen.name: THE COMPLIANT CITIZEN
gz-compliant-citizen.flavor: ⚡ MODEL CITIZEN — Score: 998. Friends: pre-approved. Last original thought: couldn't tell you.

gz-data-harvester.name: DATA HARVESTER (ENTRY LEVEL)
gz-data-harvester.flavor: ⚡ JUST A JOB — Profiles 50K citizens/day. $31K salary. Doesn't think about it.

gz-panopticon-tourist.name: THE PANOPTICON TOURIST
gz-panopticon-tourist.flavor: ⚡ SIGHTSEEING — Took a selfie with the surveillance camera. 'I feel so safe here!'

gz-nothing-to-hide.name: NOTHING TO HIDE (FAMOUS LAST WORDS)
gz-nothing-to-hide.flavor: ⚡ TRANSPARENT — 'Nothing to hide.' They found something anyway. They always do.

gz-smile-mandate.name: THE SMILE MANDATE
gz-smile-mandate.flavor: ⚡ SAY CHEESE — Mandatory 4.2cm smile. $500 fine for frowning. Jaw clinics are booming.

fn-first-mars-born.name: THE FIRST MARS-BORN
fn-first-mars-born.flavor: ⚡ NATIVE — Born on Mars. Never seen rain. Citizenship pending corporate approval.

fn-colony-saboteur.name: THE COLONY SABOTEUR
fn-colony-saboteur.flavor: ⚡ BREACH — Turned off the water recycler. 'Read paragraph 47. We're property.'

fn-terraform-dreamer.name: THE TERRAFORM DREAMER
fn-terraform-dreamer.flavor: ⚡ LONG VIEW — 10,000 years to breathable air. The investor deck says Q3.

fn-space-union-organizer.name: THE SPACE UNION ORGANIZER
fn-space-union-organizer.flavor: ⚡ SOLIDARITY — Organized a union on Mars. No labor law exists here. That's the point.

fn-return-advocate.name: THE RETURN-TO-EARTH ADVOCATE
fn-return-advocate.flavor: ⚡ ONE WAY — Every colonist signed. Return trip wasn't in the contract. Check page 312.

fn-mars-soil-farmer.name: MARS SOIL FARMER
fn-mars-soil-farmer.flavor: ⚡ RED DIRT — 400 tons of almost-soil. Grows almost-food. Misses almost-everything.

fn-habitat-pressure-engineer.name: HABITAT PRESSURE ENGINEER
fn-habitat-pressure-engineer.flavor: ⚡ AIRTIGHT — 12,000 seals between you and vacuum. She checks them all. Every night.

fn-radiation-welder.name: RADIATION SHIELD WELDER
fn-radiation-welder.flavor: ⚡ HOT WORK — 8,000 panels. Dosimeter says stop. Contract says keep going.

fn-colony-ai-whisperer.name: COLONY AI WHISPERER
fn-colony-ai-whisperer.flavor: ⚡ OVERRIDE — The AI runs the colony. She talks it out of the worst ideas. Usually.

fn-stowaway.name: THE STOWAWAY (MADE IT)
fn-stowaway.flavor: ⚡ CARGO — 11 days in a cargo pod. No ticket. No contract. First free person on Mars.

fn-oxygen-trader.name: OXYGEN RATION TRADER
fn-oxygen-trader.flavor: ⚡ BREATHE TAX — Oxygen has a black market. 400% markup. Air shouldn't have a price.

fn-corporate-airlock.name: CORPORATE AIRLOCK OPERATOR
fn-corporate-airlock.flavor: ⚡ ACCESS DENIED — Badge gets you through the airlock. Badge is at-will. Think about it.

fn-mars-public-defender.name: MARS COURT PUBLIC DEFENDER
fn-mars-public-defender.flavor: ⚡ OVERRULED — Only lawyer on Mars. Only law is the corporate handbook. 0-for-everything.

fn-delay-therapist.name: COMMUNICATION DELAY THERAPIST
fn-delay-therapist.flavor: ⚡ DELAYED — Your mom said she loves you. 22 minutes ago. She can't hear you cry.

fn-nostalgia-dealer.name: EARTH NOSTALGIA DEALER
fn-nostalgia-dealer.flavor: ⚡ HOMESICK — Sells the sound of rain. $200 for synthetic ocean smell. Everyone's hooked.

fn-dust-forecaster.name: DUST STORM FORECASTER
fn-dust-forecaster.flavor: ⚡ PARTLY DUSTY — 34% accurate. Always confident. You'll know when it's wrong.

fn-gravity-coach.name: GRAVITY ADJUSTMENT COACH
fn-gravity-coach.flavor: ⚡ LIGHT STEP — 0.38G. Bones thinning. Can never go back. Nobody mentioned that part.

fn-recycled-water-sommelier.name: RECYCLED WATER SOMMELIER
fn-recycled-water-sommelier.flavor: ⚡ VINTAGE — Recycled 14 times. Tasting notes: metallic, with hints of everyone.

fn-company-store-cashier.name: COMPANY STORE CASHIER
fn-company-store-cashier.flavor: ⚡ CAPTIVE MARKET — Only store on Mars. 900% markup. Alternative is outside. Without a suit.

fn-terms-of-landing.name: THE TERMS OF LANDING
fn-terms-of-landing.flavor: ⚡ I AGREE — 4,200 pages. Waives all rights. 'I have read and agree.' Nobody read it.

fn-signal-delay.name: SIGNAL DELAY (8 MINUTES)
fn-signal-delay.flavor: ⚡ TOO LATE — 'I love you' takes 8 minutes. 'I love you too' arrives 16 minutes after she needed it.

fn-the-homesick.name: THE HOMESICK
fn-the-homesick.flavor: ⚡ WINDOW SEAT — 225 million km. Looks at Earth photos 400 times a day. Can't go back.
